Design_Description: 2-layer cascaded decoder with dynamic Gaussian reprojection bias (fixed σ=4, γ=2), no auxiliary loss.
2-layer cascaded decoder with dynamic Gaussian reprojection bias (fixed σ=4, γ=2) and auxiliary body-joint loss (weight=0.4) on layer-1 output.
2-layer cascaded decoder with dynamic Gaussian reprojection bias, auxiliary loss (weight=0.4), and learnable per-joint σ and γ initialized to (4.0, 2.0).
